trends.title: ‘Underconsumption core’ backlash grows
trends.summary: Creators reframing cleaning-product haul/restock content as wasteful; ‘use what you have’ framing racking up millions of views.
trends.angle: Portfolio reputational watch-item. Ride the sentiment with value / ‘one bottle does more’ efficacy messaging rather than fighting it.

trends.title: Restock & refill ASMR still a top format
trends.summary: ‘Restock my cleaning cabinet’ decant/ASMR remains a dominant home-content format across TikTok and YouTube.
trends.angle: Seed refill-friendly / decant-ready packaging moments with cleaning creators.

trends.title: ‘Laundry stripping’ resurgence
trends.summary: Viral before/after soak videos showing ‘hidden dirt’; fuels skepticism about everyday detergent efficacy.
trends.angle: Efficacy-defense moment: deep-clean proof demos (Dawn degrease, Cascade food-film removal).

trends.title: Hard-water spot complaints trending
trends.summary: ‘Cloudy glasses’ / dishwasher spotting frustration spiking; users blaming detergents and switching brands.
trends.angle: Direct Cascade win: rinse-aid + Platinum spot-protection proof; intercept switchers with a demo.

trends.title: Ingredient-safety attack recirculating
trends.summary: ‘Toxic ingredients’ posts targeting dish soaps incl. Dawn; amplified by clean-living creators, offset by wildlife-rescue goodwill.
trends.angle: Lean on wildlife-rescue equity + transparent ingredient explainer with a trusted science creator. Do NOT amplify the claim directly.

trends.title: Powerwash ‘one-spray’ hacks evergreen
trends.summary: Powerwash over-indexes in cleaning-hack content (stovetops, sneakers, patios); strong organic advocacy.
trends.angle: Amplify UGC: creator ‘surprising uses’ series; low cost, high affinity.

trends.title: Magic Eraser ‘what NOT to use it on’ discourse
trends.summary: Cautionary content about surfaces it damages (screens, car paint) getting big reach; mix of helpful + alarmist.
trends.angle: Get ahead with an official ‘best uses / avoid’ guide via a trusted cleaning creator; turns caution into usage confidence.

trends.title: ‘Just masks smells’ skepticism persists
trends.summary: Recurring critique that air fresheners cover rather than eliminate odor; rivals leaning into ‘natural’ positioning.
trends.angle: Odor-elimination proof (pet/cooking) demos; ‘eliminates vs masks’ mechanism explainer.

trends.title: Refill-cost complaints vs reusable mops
trends.summary: ‘Swiffer is a scam / buy reusable’ value critique steady; reusable-pad dupes promoted heavily.
trends.angle: Value + convenience reframe; WetJet deep-clean demos; consider washable-pad narrative.

trends.title: The Pink Stuff momentum still elevated
trends.summary: Cult paste sustains heavy creator adoption for ‘impossible’ stain jobs; strong earned reach, near-zero paid.
trends.angle: Direct Magic Eraser overlap. Counter with a heavy-duty head-to-head scrub demo + creator seeding.

trends.title: Hypochlorous-acid (HOCl) cleaners surging
trends.summary: ‘Force of Nature’-style HOCl sprays framed as safe, non-toxic, kid/pet-friendly; fast-growing clean-living challenger.
trends.angle: Emerging threat to multi-surface & air-care. Track claims; prep a ‘proven clean, no compromise’ counter-narrative.

trends.title: ‘Purple cleaner’ dupes targeting Mr. Clean
trends.summary: Generic purple multi-surface cleaners positioned as cheaper Mr. Clean alternatives; heavy dupe-culture framing.
trends.angle: Defend with brand-trust + efficacy proof; monitor pricing/perception gap.

trends.title: Refill-tablet sustainability push
trends.summary: Tablet & concentrate brands leaning on plastic-reduction; resonates with ‘underconsumption’ sentiment.
trends.angle: Watch sustainability perception gap vs P&G refill efforts; message accordingly.
